## Evidence and Data Integrity

- [ ] No secrets, generated archives, review queues, databases, or reports are committed.
- [ ] Application-facing source manifests use real public sources.
- [ ] New production claims include source URLs and traceable evidence quotes.
- [ ] LLM-extracted claims have been reviewed before being used in formal reports.
